exclude.@eslint/js: Must upgrade together with eslint when eslint v10 peer deps are resolved
exclude.typescript: TS 6.0.x breaks CSS/SCSS side-effect imports (TS2882 in src/app/blog/[slug]/page.tsx and src/app/layout.tsx) and surfaces a vitest/rolldown vs vite peer-type mismatch in vitest.config.ts (rolldownVersion missing in PluginContextMeta). Hold at TS 5.9.x until Next.js + vitest ship TS-6-compatible types. Verified 2026-05-23.
